ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Clean up your vault after import. Click a step to begin, or start from the first step.
ast.target: 导入完成后清理您的保险库。点击任一步骤开始，或从第一步开始。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: No issues found in any category.
ast.target: 未在任何类别中发现任何问题。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Click a row to open the person note for editing.
ast.target: 点击某行以打开人员笔记进行编辑。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Indexed properties (source, source_2, source_3...) will be converted to a sources array.
ast.target: 索引属性（source、source_2、source_3...）将转换为 sources 数组。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: The singular "person" property will be converted to a "persons" array.
ast.target: 单数 "person" 属性将转换为 "persons" 数组。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: The nested "sourced_facts" object will be converted to flat "sourced_*" properties.
ast.target: 嵌套的 "sourced_facts" 对象将转换为扁平的 "sourced_*" 属性。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Inline events will be converted to separate event note files linked via "life_events".
ast.target: 内联事件将转换为通过 "life_events" 关联的独立事件笔记文件。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: The legacy "child" property will be converted to the "children" property.
ast.target: 旧版 "child" 属性将转换为 "children" 属性。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Select variants to standardize. The canonical form is shown on the right.
ast.target: 选择要标准化的变体。标准形式显示在右侧。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Select which file to keep as canonical for each place. Duplicates will be merged and deleted.
ast.target: 为每个位置选择保留哪个文件作为标准文件。重复项将被合并并删除。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: This will use OpenStreetMap's Nominatim service to look up coordinates. The process respects the API rate limit (1 request per second).
ast.target: 这将使用OpenStreetMap的Nominatim服务查找坐标。该过程遵守API速率限制（每秒1次请求）。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: This will geocode each place, parse the full address into hierarchy components (city → county → state → country), and create or link parent place notes.
ast.target: 这将对每个位置进行地理编码，将完整地址解析为层级组件（城市 → 县 → 州 → 国家），并创建或链接父级位置笔记。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: If your GEDCOM has full paths like "/media/photos/ancestors/smith/photo.jpg", enter the prefix to strip. Only the filename will be used as a wikilink.
ast.target: 如果您的GEDCOM包含完整路径，例如“/media/photos/ancestors/smith/photo.jpg”，请输入要移除的前缀。仅文件名将用作维基链接。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Reference numbers help organize and cite individuals in your tree. You can also do this later from the context menu.
ast.target: 参考编号有助于在您的家谱中组织和引用个人。您也可以稍后从上下文菜单中执行此操作。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Numbers are assigned relative to this person.
ast.target: 编号将相对于此个人进行分配。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: These folders are configured in your Preferences settings.
ast.target: 这些文件夹已在您的偏好设置中配置。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Specify custom folders for this export.
ast.target: 为此导出指定自定义文件夹。

ast.source: EXIF initialized. Press again to view data in console.
ast.target: EXIF 已初始化。再次点击以在控制台中查看数据。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: These folders determine where new notes are created. Charted Roots identifies notes by their properties (cr_type), not their location—your notes can live anywhere in your vault.
ast.target: 这些文件夹决定了新笔记的创建位置。图表根节点通过其属性（cr_type）识别笔记，而非其位置——您的笔记可以存放在库中的任意位置。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Changes apply to new tree generations. To update existing canvases, right-click the canvas file and select "Re-layout family tree".
ast.target: 更改仅适用于新的树状结构生成。若要更新现有画布，请右键单击画布文件并选择“重新布局家谱”。

ast.target: 可选。启用 GeoNames 作为额外的查询数据源。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This operation standardizes name capitalization and handles surname prefixes:

ast.source: Dutch/German prefixes: "Vincent Van Gogh" → "Vincent van Gogh"
ast.target: 荷兰/德国前缀："Vincent Van Gogh" → "Vincent van Gogh"

ast.name: text
ast.source: Multiple spaces collapsed to single space
ast.target: 多个空格合并为单个空格

ast.name: text
ast.source: This operation fixes one-way relationships by adding the missing reciprocal links:
ast.target: 此操作通过添加缺失的互惠链接来修复单向关系：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Parent lists child, but child doesn't list parent
ast.target: 父级包含子级，但子级未包含父级

ast.name: text
ast.source: Child lists parent, but parent doesn't list child
ast.target: 子级包含父级，但父级未包含子级

ast.name: text
ast.source: Person A lists Person B as spouse, but B doesn't list A
ast.target: 人员A将人员B列为配偶，但B未将A列为配偶

ast.name: text
ast.source: Backup your vault before proceeding. This operation will add missing relationship links to notes.
ast.target: 请在继续前备份您的库。此操作将为笔记添加缺失的关系链接。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This preview shows logical date errors that need manual review and correction:
ast.target: 此预览显示需要手动审查和修正的逻辑日期错误：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Birth after death or death before birth
ast.target: 出生时间在死亡时间之后或死亡时间在出生时间之前

ast.name: text
ast.target: 不切实际的寿命（超过120年）

ast.name: text
ast.source: Parents born after children or children born after parent death
ast.target: 父母出生时间在子女之后或子女出生时间在父母死亡之后

ast.name: text
ast.source: Parents too young at child's birth (<10 years)
ast.target: 子女出生时父母年龄过小（小于10岁）

ast.name: text
ast.source: This is a preview-only tool. Review the issues and manually correct the dates in the affected notes.
ast.target: 这是一个仅用于预览的工具。请审查问题，并在相关笔记中手动修正日期。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Genealogical records use biological sex (M/F) rather than gender identity, as historical documents and DNA analysis require this distinction.
ast.target: 家谱记录使用生物学性别（男/女）而非性别认同，因为历史文献和DNA分析需要这种区分。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Sex normalization is disabled. The preview below shows what would be changed, but no changes will be applied. Change this in Settings → Charted Roots → Sex & gender.
ast.target: 性别标准化已禁用。下方预览显示了将要进行的更改，但不会实际应用任何修改。请在设置 → 可视化家系 → 性别与性别中更改此项。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Populates missing _id fields by resolving wikilinks to their cr_id values. This improves relationship reliability when notes are renamed.
ast.target: 通过解析维基链接以获取其cr_id值，填充缺失的_id字段。这在笔记重命名时可提高关系的可靠性。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No changes needed. All values are already in the correct format.
ast.target: 无需更改。所有值均已处于正确格式。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No normalizable values found. The listed values are unrecognized and will not be changed.
ast.target: 未找到可归一化的值。所列值未被识别，不会进行更改。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Date validation is preview-only. Click "Open note" to manually correct each date. Configure validation rules in Settings → Charted Roots → Dates & validation.
ast.target: 日期验证仅用于预览。点击“打开笔记”以手动修正每个日期。在设置 → Charted Roots → 日期与验证中配置验证规则。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No issues match the current filters
ast.target: 当前筛选条件无匹配项

ast.name: text
ast.source: Click "Scan for nested properties" to find notes that need flattening.
ast.target: 点击“扫描嵌套属性”以查找需要展平的笔记。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Scan your genealogy data to identify data issues like missing dates, invalid values, circular relationships, and orphaned parent references.
ast.target: 扫描您的家谱数据以识别数据问题，例如缺失日期、无效值、循环关系以及孤立的父级引用。

ast.name: text
ast.source: These operations work across people, places, events, and sources. Use Preview to see what will change before applying. For entity-specific operations, see the domain tabs (People, Places, etc.).
ast.target: 这些操作适用于人员、地点、事件和来源。使用预览功能查看将要更改的内容后再应用。对于特定实体的操作，请参见相应的领域标签页（人员、地点等）。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Enhance your notes by generating place notes from place strings in person and event notes. Useful for data imported from CSV, manually entered records, or vaults created before place notes were supported.
ast.target: 通过从人员和事件笔记中的地点字符串生成地点笔记来增强您的笔记。适用于从CSV导入、手动输入的记录或在支持地点笔记之前创建的库中的数据。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Create Obsidian Bases to view and manage your data in spreadsheet-like table views.
ast.target: 创建Obsidian基础以在类似电子表格的表格视图中查看和管理您的数据。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Identify facts that need sources or stronger evidence. Focus research efforts on gaps in your documentation.
ast.target: 识别需要来源或更强证据的事实。集中研究努力以填补文档中的空白。

ast.source: No fact-level source tracking data found. Add sourced_* properties to your person notes to track research coverage.
ast.target: 未找到事实级别来源追踪数据。请在人物笔记中添加 sourced_* 属性以追踪研究覆盖情况。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Track and resolve cases where multiple sources provide conflicting information about the same fact.
ast.target: 追踪并解决多个来源对同一事实提供矛盾信息的情况。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No proof summaries created yet. Use proof summaries to document your research reasoning and resolve conflicting evidence.
ast.target: 尚未创建任何证据摘要。请使用证据摘要记录研究推理过程并解决相互矛盾的证据。

ast.target: 此操作将向所有未包含“cr_type: person”的人员笔记添加“cr_type: person”。建议执行此操作以提升兼容性，并确保所有批量操作能够可靠地查找您的人员笔记。

ast.target: 在 Obsidian Bases 和 Dataview 中简化查询

ast.name: text
ast.source: This version fixes compatibility issues with Obsidian's Properties panel. Two features have been redesigned to use flat property formats that work seamlessly with Obsidian.
ast.target: 此版本修复了与 Obsidian 属性面板的兼容性问题。两项功能已重新设计，采用扁平化属性格式，可与 Obsidian 无缝集成。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The nested sourced_facts object is replaced with individual flat properties for each fact type.
ast.target: 嵌套的 sourced_facts 对象被替换为每个事实类型的独立扁平属性。

ast.name: text
ast.source:
sourced_facts:
  birth_date:
    sources:
      - "[[Census 1870]]"
  death_date:
    sources:
      - "[[Death Certificate]]"
ast.target:
来源事实:
  出生日期:
    来源:
      - "[[1870年人口普查]]"
  死亡日期:
    来源:
      - "[[死亡证明]]"

ast.name: text
ast.target:
sourced_birth_date:
  - "[[1870年人口普查]]"
sourced_death_date:
  - "[[死亡证明]]"

ast.name: text
ast.source: Inline events arrays are replaced with links to separate event note files.
ast.target: 内联事件数组已被替换为指向独立事件备注文件的链接。

ast.name: text
ast.source:
events:
  - event_type: residence
    place: "[[New York]]"
    date_from: "1920"
ast.target:
events:
  - event_type: residence
    place: "[[纽约]]"
    date_from: "1920"

ast.name: text
